mapper.select: SELECT A.RPR_OGN_NM AS PT01_RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 ,A.RPR_RSPSB_P_NM AS PT01_RPR_RSPSB_P_NM --보고책임자명 ,A.RPR_CHRG_P_NM AS PT01_RPR_CHRG_P_NM --보고담당자명 ,A.RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO AS PT01_RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO --보고담당자전화번호 FROM NIC86B A WHERE ROWNUM<2

SELECT B.DL_P_NM PT02_01_DL_P_NM --거래자명 ,B.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD PT02_01_DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD --거래자실명번호구분코드 ,B.DL_P_RNMCNO PT02_01_DL_P_RNMCNO --거래자실명확인번호 ,DECODE(B.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR','01','02') PT02_01_DL_P_NTNLT_CD --거래자국적코드 ,B.DL_P_NTNLT_NM PT02_01_DL_P_NTNLT_NM --거래자국적명 ,C.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_PST_NO --거래자자택우편번호 ,C.DL_P_HSE_ADDR PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_ADDR --거래자자택주소 ,C.DL_P_BRTDY PT02_01_DL_P_BRTDY --거래자생년월일 ,C.DL_P_SEX_CD PT02_01_DL_P_SEX_CD --거래자성별코드 ,C.DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO --거래자자택전화번호 ,C.DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO PT02_01_DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO --거래자휴대전화번호 ,C.RNM_CMBNTN_NO PT02_01_RNM_CMBNTN_NO --실명조합번호 ,C.DL_P_PSPT_NO PT02_01_DL_P_PSPT_NO --거래자여권번호 ,C.OCPTN_CCD PT02_01_OCPTN_CCD --직업구분코드 ,C.OCPTN_CCD_NM PT02_01_OCPTN_CCD_NM --직업구분코드명 ,C.WP_NM PT02_01_WP_NM --직장명 ,C.DTY_DPRT_NM PT02_01_DTY_DPRT_NM --근무부점명 ,C.CS_PSTN_CD PT02_01_CS_PSTN_CD --고객직위코드 ,C.RPRST_P_NM PT02_01_RPRST_P_NM --대표자명 ,C.IND_TYP_CD PT02_01_IND_TYP_CD --업종코드 ,C.IND_TYP_CD_NM PT02_01_IND_TYP_CD_NM --업종코드명 ,C.RPRST_P_RNM_NO PT02_01_RPRST_P_RNM_NO --대표자실명번호 ,C.LG_AMT_ASTS_F PT02_01_LG_AMT_ASTS_F --고액자산여부 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC70B B ,NIC78B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.DL_P_RNMCNO = C.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT D.DL_DT --거래일자 ,D.DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,D.DL_TM --거래시간 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.DL_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VIEW_DL_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.DL_TM,'HH24MISS'),'HH24:MI:SS') AS VIEW_DL_TM ,D.DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,D.DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,D.DL_WY_CD --거래방법코드(수단) ,D.DL_WY_NM --거래방법명 ,D.CTR_DL_KND_CD --CTR거래종류코드 ,D.DL_AMT --거래금액 ,TO_CHAR(NVL(D.DL_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,990') AS VIEW_DL_AMT ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OPN_PRXY_F --상대대체개설대리인여부 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM --상대대체계좌명 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD --상대대체계좌실명확인구분코드 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO --상대대체계좌실명번호 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_TEL_NO --상대대체계좌소유전화번호 ,G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD --상대대체계좌소유국가코드 ,DECODE(NVL(H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,''),'','2','1') AS VIEW_AC_PRXY_YN ,H.PRXY_NM AS AC_PRXY_NM ,H.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD AS AC_PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD ,H.PRXY_RNMCNO AS AC_PRXY_RNMCNO ,H.PRXY_TEL_NO AS AC_PRXY_TEL_NO ,DECODE(NVL(H.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,''),'','','KR','01','02') AS AC_PRXY_NTNLT_CD ,H.PRXY_NTNLT_NM AS AC_PRXY_NTNLT_NM ,H.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD AS AC_AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD ,CASE H.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD WHEN '1' THEN '03' WHEN '2' THEN '02' WHEN '3' THEN '04' WHEN '4' THEN '05' WHEN '5' THEN '07' WHEN '6' THEN '12' WHEN '7' THEN '08' WHEN '9' THEN '98' ELSE H.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD END AS VIEW_AC_AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD --56 계좌대리인 거래자와관계코드 ,B.GNL_AC_NO --종합계좌번호 ,B.GDS_NO --상품번호 ,B.GDS_OPN_DT --상품개설일자 ,B.GDS_OPN_BRN_CD --상품개설지점코드 ,B.AC_OPN_BRN_NM --계좌개설지점명 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD --주거래부점코드 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_NM --주거래부점명 ,B.AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO --계좌개설지점우편번호 ,B.AC_OPN_PRXY_F --계좌개설대리인여부 ,DECODE(NVL(C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,''),'','2','1') AS VIEW_PRXY_YN --계좌대리인여부 ,C.PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,C.AGNC_EXTNT_CD --대리권범위코드 ,C.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명번호구분코드 ,C.PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명확인번호 ,C.PRXY_TEL_NO --대리인전화번호 ,DECODE(NVL(C.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,''),'','','KR','01','02') PRXY_NTNLT_CD --대리인국적코드 ,C.PRXY_NTNLT_NM --대리인국적명 ,C.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD --계좌소유자관계코드 ,CASE C.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD WHEN '1' THEN '03' WHEN '2' THEN '02' WHEN '3' THEN '04' WHEN '4' THEN '05' WHEN '5' THEN '07' WHEN '6' THEN '12' WHEN '7' THEN '08' WHEN '9' THEN '98' ELSE C.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD END AS VIEW_AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD --56 계좌대리인 거래자와관계코드 ,E.CHCK_KND_CD --수표종류코드 ,E.CHCK_STRT_NO --수표시작번호 ,E.CHCK_END_NO --수표종료번호 ,D.CSH_PY_FOGN_NM --현금지급금융기관명 ,D.CSH_PY_FOGN_CD --현금지급금융기관코드 ,D.CSH_PY_BRN_NM --현금지급지점명 ,D.CSH_PY_BRN_CD --현금지급지점코드 ,D.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO --취급지점우편번호 ,D.HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급지점명 /* 취소 또는 정정 보고에 관한 정보 */ --선택사항이며, 01번 메시지 타입 코드값이 02,03,97,98일경우 필수 항목 ,CASE WHEN A.RPR_CCD NOT IN ('01','93') THEN ( SELECT S.CNTNT FROM NIC66B_W S WHERE (S.INST_ID, S.WORK_ID) IN ( SELECT K.INST_ID, MIN(K.WORK_ID) FROM NIC66B_W K WHERE K.INST_ID = A.INST_ID GROUP BY K.INST_ID ) ) ELSE '' END AS VIEW_COMMENT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC72B C ,NIC75B D ,NIC76B E ,NIC77B F ,NIC83B G ,NIC98B H WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = E.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = E.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = F.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = F.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = F.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = F.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = G.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = H.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = H.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = H.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = H.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = H.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT NVL(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO, ' ') CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO --상대대체계좌번호 ,NVL(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM, ' ') CPRTY_TRSNS_FOGN_NM --상대대체금융기관명 ,NVL(G.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM, ' ') CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM --상대대체계좌명 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC72B C ,NIC75B D ,NIC76B E ,NIC77B F ,NIC83B G ,NIC70B H ,NIC78B I ,NIC79B J WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = E.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = E.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = F.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = F.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = F.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = F.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = G.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = H.DL_P_RNMCNO AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND H.DL_P_RNMCNO = I.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND H.DL_P_RNMCNO = J.DL_P_RNMCNO(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT A.RPR_OGN_NM AS PT01_RPR_OGN_NM --보고기관명 ,A.RPR_RSPSB_P_NM AS PT01_RPR_RSPSB_P_NM --보고책임자명 ,A.RPR_CHRG_P_NM AS PT01_RPR_CHRG_P_NM --보고담당자명 ,A.RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO AS PT01_RPR_CHRG_P_TEL_NO --보고담당자전화번호 FROM NIC86B A WHERE ROWNUM < 2

SELECT B.DL_P_NM PT02_01_DL_P_NM --거래자명 ,B.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD PT02_01_DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD --거래자실명번호구분코드 ,B.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID PT02_01_DL_P_AML_CUST_ID --거래자실명확인번호 ,DECODE(B.DL_P_NTNLT_CD'KR''01''02') PT02_01_DL_P_NTNLT_CD --거래자국적코드 ,B.DL_P_NTNLT_NM PT02_01_DL_P_NTNLT_NM --거래자국적명 ,C.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_PST_NO --거래자자택우편번호 ,C.DL_P_HSE_ADDR PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_ADDR --거래자자택주소 ,C.DL_P_BRTDY PT02_01_DL_P_BRTDY --거래자생년월일 ,C.DL_P_SEX_CD PT02_01_DL_P_SEX_CD --거래자성별코드 ,C.DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO PT02_01_DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO --거래자자택전화번호 ,C.DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO PT02_01_DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO --거래자휴대전화번호 ,C.RNM_CMBNTN_NO PT02_01_RNM_CMBNTN_NO --실명조합번호 ,C.DL_P_PSPT_NO PT02_01_DL_P_PSPT_NO --거래자여권번호 ,C.OCPTN_CCD PT02_01_OCPTN_CCD --직업구분코드 ,C.OCPTN_CCD_NM PT02_01_OCPTN_CCD_NM --직업구분코드명 ,C.WP_NM PT02_01_WP_NM --직장명 ,C.DTY_DPRT_NM PT02_01_DTY_DPRT_NM --근무부점명 ,C.CS_PSTN_CD PT02_01_CS_PSTN_CD --고객직위코드 ,C.RPRST_P_NM PT02_01_RPRST_P_NM --대표자명 ,C.IND_TYP_CD PT02_01_IND_TYP_CD --업종코드 ,C.IND_TYP_CD_NM PT02_01_IND_TYP_CD_NM --업종코드명 ,C.RPRST_P_RNM_NO PT02_01_RPRST_P_RNM_NO --대표자실명번호 ,C.LG_AMT_ASTS_F PT02_01_LG_AMT_ASTS_F --고액자산여부 ,B.INDV_CORP_CCD PT02_01_INDV_CORP_CCD --개인법인구분코드 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC70B B ,NIC78B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = B.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = C.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID(+) AND B.INDV_CORP_CCD = '1' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK () OVER (ORDER BY D.DL_DT,D.DL_TM) PT03_ROWNUM ,D.DL_DT PT03_DL_DT --거래일자 ,D.DL_SQ PT03_DL_SQ --거래일련번호 ,D.DL_TM PT03_DL_TM --거래시간 ,D.DL_CHNNL_CD PT03_DL_CHNNL_CD --거래채널코드 ,D.DL_CHNNL_NM PT03_DL_CHNNL_NM --거래채널명 ,D.HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO PT03_HANDLNG_BRN_PST_NO --취급지점우편번호 ,D.HANDLNG_BRN_NM PT03_HANDLNG_BRN_NM --취급지점명 ,D.DL_WY_CD PT03_DL_WY_CD --거래방법코드(수단) ,D.DL_WY_NM PT03_DL_WY_NM --거래방법명 ,D.DL_TYP_CD PT03_STR_DL_KND_CD --STR거래종류코드 ,D.DL_KND_NM PT03_DL_KND_NM --거래종류명 ,B.GDS_NO PT03_DL_GDS_CD --거래상품코드 ,D.CRNCY_CD PT03_CRNCY_CD --통화코드 ,TO_CHAR(NVL(D.DL_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,990') PT03_DL_AMT --거래금액 ,TO_CHAR(NVL(D.FCRNCY_DL_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,990') PT03_FCRNCY_DL_AMT --외화거래금액 ,TO_CHAR(NVL(D.USD_EXCH_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,990') PT03_USD_EXCH_AMT --달러환산금액 ,E.CHCK_KND_CD PT03_CHCK_KND_CD --수표종류코드 ,E.CHCK_STRT_NO PT03_CHCK_STRT_NO --수표시작번호 ,E.CHCK_END_NO PT03_CHCK_END_NO --수표종료번호 ,E.ISNG_BNK_CD PT03_ISNG_BNK_CD --발행은행코드 ,E.ISNG_BNK_NM PT03_ISNG_BNK_NM --발행은행명 ,E.BLL_TYP_AMT PT03_BLL_TYP_AMT --권종금액 ,E.CHCK_AMT PT03_CHCK_AMT --수표금액 ,E.CHCK_ISNG_DT PT03_CHCK_ISNG_DT --수표발행일자 ,E.ENDRS_P_NM PT03_ENDRS_P_NM --배서자명 ,E.ENDRS_P_KND_CD PT03_ENDRS_P_KND_CD --배서자종류코드 ,E.ENDRS_P_RNM_NO PT03_ENDRS_P_RNM_NO --배서자실명번호 ,E.ENDRS_P_TEL_NO PT03_ENDRS_P_TEL_NO --배서자전화번호 ,E.IO_CCD PT03_IO_CCD --입출구분코드 ,E.ENDRS_P_F PT03_ENDRS_P_F --배서자여부 ,D.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD PT03_FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD --외환거래목적코드 ,D.FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM PT03_FXCH_DL_OBJ_CD_NM --외환거래목적코드명 ,C.PRXY_NM PT03_PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,C.AGNC_EXTNT_CD PT03_AGNC_EXTNT_CD --대리권범위코드 ,C.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD PT03_PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명번호구분코드 ,C.PRXY_RNMCNO PT03_PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명확인번호 ,C.PRXY_TEL_NO PT03_PRXY_TEL_NO --대리인전화번호 ,DECODE(C.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR','01', '', '', '02') PT03_PRXY_NTNLT_CD --대리인국적코드 ,C.PRXY_NTNLT_NM PT03_PRXY_NTNLT_NM --대리인국적명 ,C.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD PT03_AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD --계좌소유자관계코드 ,CASE WHEN B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '9' END AS PT03_B_RL_AC_YN --관련계좌존재여부 ,CASE WHEN G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NOT NULL AND K.TRNS_OGN_CD = G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD THEN '1' WHEN G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT IS NOT NULL AND K.TRNS_OGN_CD <> G.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD THEN '2' ELSE '9' END AS PT03_G_RL_AC_YN --송수취계좌여부 ,DECODE(NVL(C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'NULL'),'NULL','N','Y') AS PT03_PRXY_YN --대리인 존재여부 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC72B C ,NIC75B D ,NIC76B E ,NIC77B F ,NIC83B G ,NIC86B K WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = E.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = E.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = F.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = F.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = F.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = F.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = G.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY D.DL_DT,D.DL_TM ) WHERE PT03_ROWNUM = #{PT03_ROWNUM}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DENSE_RANK () OVER (ORDER BY D.DL_DT,D.DL_TM) PT04_ROWNUM ,B.GNL_AC_NO PT04_GNL_AC_NO --종합계좌번호 ,B.GDS_NO PT04_GDS_NO --상품번호 ,B.GDS_OPN_DT PT04_GDS_OPN_DT --상품개설일자 ,(SELECT RPR_OGN_NM FROM NIC86B WHERE ROWNUM = 1) PT04_RPR_OGN_NM --금융기관명 ,B.AC_OPN_BRN_NM PT04_AC_OPN_BRN_NM --계좌개설지점명 ,B.AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO PT04_AC_OPN_BRN_PST_NO --계좌개설지점우편번호 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD PT04_MN_DL_DPRT_CD --주거래부점코드 ,B.MN_DL_DPRT_NM PT04_MN_DL_DPRT_NM --주거래부점명 ,B.AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD PT04_AC_OPN_OBJ_CCD --계좌개설목적구분코드 88 ,B.AC_OPN_PRXY_F PT04_AC_OPN_PRXY_F --계좌개설대리인여부 89 ,B.GDS_OPN_BRN_CD PT04_GDS_OPN_BRN_CD --상품개설지점코드 ,H.DL_P_NM PT04_DL_P_NM --거래자명 ,H.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD PT04_DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD --거래자실명번호구분코드 91 ,H.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID PT04_DL_P_AML_CUST_ID --거래자실명확인번호 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.DL_P_BRTDY,'2',J.BSNSG_FNDTN_DT) PT04_DL_P_BRTDY --거래자생년월일 ,DECODE(H.DL_P_NTNLT_CD,'KR','01','02') PT04_DL_P_NTNLT_CD --거래자국적코드 ,H.DL_P_NTNLT_NM PT04_DL_P_NTNLT_NM --거래자국적명 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.DL_P_HSE_PST_NO,'2',J.HD_BRNCH_PST_NO) PT04_DL_P_HSE_PST_NO --거래자자택우편번호 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.DL_P_HSE_ADDR,'2',J.HD_BRNCH_ADDR) PT04_DL_P_HSE_ADDR --거래자자택주소 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO,'2',J.HD_BRNCH_TEL_NO) PT04_DL_P_HSE_TEL_NO --거래자자택전화번호 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO,'2','') PT04_DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO --거래자휴대전화번호 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.RPRST_P_NM,'2',K.RPRST_P_NM) PT04_RPRST_P_NM --대표자명 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1','01','2',K.RPRST_P_RNM_CNFR_CCD) PT04_RPRST_P_RNM_NO_CCD --대표자실명번호구분코 드 99 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1',I.RPRST_P_RNM_NO,'2',K.RPRST_P_RNMCNO) PT04_RPRST_P_RNMCNO --대표자실명확인번호 ,DECODE(H.INDV_CORP_CCD,'1','','2',K.RPRST_P_TEL_NO) PT04_RPRST_P_TEL_NO --대표자전화번호 ,DECODE(K.RPRST_P_NTNLT,'KR','01', '', '', '02') PT04_RPRST_P_NTNLT_CD --대표자국적코드 102 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004',K.RPRST_P_NTNLT) PT04_RPRST_P_NTNLT_NM --대표자국적명 ,C.PRXY_NM PT04_PRXY_NM --대리인명 ,C.AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD PT04_AC_OWN_P_RLTNS_CD --계좌소유자관계코드 104 ,C.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD PT04_PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD --대리인실명번호구분코드 105 ,C.PRXY_RNMCNO PT04_PRXY_RNMCNO --대리인실명확인번호 ,C.PRXY_TEL_NO PT04_PRXY_TEL_NO --대리인전화번호 ,DECODE(C.PRXY_NTNLT_CD,'KR','01', '', '', '02') PT04_PRXY_NTNLT_CD --대리인국적코드 108 ,C.PRXY_NTNLT_NM PT04_PRXY_NTNLT_NM --대리인국적명 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC71B B ,NIC72B C ,NIC75B D ,NIC76B E ,NIC77B F ,NIC83B G ,NIC70B H ,NIC78B I ,NIC79B J ,( SELECT A.* FROM NIC03B_1 A , ( SELECT AML_CUST_ID , MIN(RPRST_P_SQ) AS RPRST_P_SQ FROM NIC03B_1 WHERE RPR_TGT_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY AML_CUST_ID ) B WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND A.RPRST_P_SQ = B.RPRST_P_SQ ) K WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO(+) AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = D.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = D.GDS_NO AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = E.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = E.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = E.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = E.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = E.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = E.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = F.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = F.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = F.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = F.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = F.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = F.DL_SQ(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = G.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND D.SSPS_DL_ID = G.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND D.GNL_AC_NO = G.GNL_AC_NO(+) AND D.GDS_NO = G.GDS_NO(+) AND D.DL_DT = G.DL_DT(+) AND D.DL_SQ = G.DL_SQ(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = H.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND H.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = I.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID(+) AND H.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = J.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND H.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = J.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID(+) AND H.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = K.AML_CUST_ID(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{param_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = #{param_SSPS_DL_ID} ORDER BY D.DL_DT,D.DL_TM ) WHERE PT04_ROWNUM = #{PT04_ROWNUM}

SELECT (SELECT K.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B K WHERE K.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_BRN_CD) AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,SUM(DECODE(B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,0, 1, 0)) AS BRN_PRGRS1 --지점 미처리건 ,SUM(DECODE(B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, 1, 1, 0)) AS BRN_PRGRS2 --지점 처리건 ,SUM(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, 9, 0, 99, 0, 1)) AS PRGRS1 --본점 미처리건 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (9, 99) THEN DECODE (A.OK_CCD, 2, 1, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS PRGRS2 --본점 보고제외건 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (9, 99) THEN DECODE (A.OK_CCD, 1, 1, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS PRGRS3 --본점 보고건 ,COUNT(*) AS PRGRS_ALL --전체건 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_SD} AND #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_ED} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID GROUP BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD

SELECT (SELECT C.DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B C WHERE C.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_BRN_CD) AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,(SELECT D.DPRT_CD FROM NIC41B D WHERE D.DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_BRN_CD) AS MN_DL_BRN_CD ,SUM(DECODE(B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, 0, 1, 0)) AS BRN_PRGRS1 --지점 미처리건 ,SUM(DECODE(B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, 1, 1, 0)) AS BRN_PRGRS2 --지점 처리건 ,SUM(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, 9, 0, 99, 0, 1)) AS PRGRS1 --본점 미처리건 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (9, 99) THEN DECODE (A.OK_CCD, 2, 1, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS PRGRS2 --본점 보고제외건 ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN (9, 99) THEN DECODE (A.OK_CCD, 1, 1, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS PRGRS3 --본점 보고건 ,COUNT(*) AS PRGRS_ALL --전체건 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_SD} AND #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_ED} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID GROUP BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT',B.MN_DL_BRN_CD,'') AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101',A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM --, A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,SUM(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1,0)) AS RPR_CNT, COUNT(*) AS TOT_CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_SD} AND #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_ED} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC','CTR','CAC') GROUP BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD ORDER BY MN_DL_BRN_CD

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT', B.MN_DL_BRN_CD,'') AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM --, A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,SUM(DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1, 0)) AS RPR_CNT, COUNT(*) AS TOT_CNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_SD} AND #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_ED} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') GROUP BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD ORDER BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DPT', B.MN_DL_BRN_CD, '') AS MN_DL_BRN_NM ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, A.SSPS_DL_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A101',A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD) AS SSPS_DL_CRT_NM ,GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS SSPS_TYP_NM --, A.SSPS_TYP_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('A004', A.RSK_GRD_CD) AS RSK_GRD_NM ,DECODE(B.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '1', 'Y', 'N') AS BRN_YN ,DECODE(A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 'Y', 'N') AS RPR_YN FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_SD} AND #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT_ED} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC','CTR','CAC') AND B.MN_DL_BRN_CD LIKE #{ML_DL_BRN_CD} ORDER BY B.MN_DL_BRN_CD ,A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT ,A.SSPS_DL_ID

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT',TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD'),'') HNDL_DT -- 추출일자 ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'') RPT_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 일자 ,B.MN_DL_BRN_NM RPT_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM -- 영업점명 --Fn_Cdinfo_Var('AC',C.GNL_ACL_AC_NO||C.GDS_NO,'') PRT_CS_NM -- 계좌명 ,NVL(E.CS_NM, E.ENG_CS_NM) AS PRT_CS_NM -- 계좌명 ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD SSPS_TYP_CD -- 시나리오 룰번호 ,CASE WHEN A.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '임의 보고' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM -- 시나리오 룰 ,D.RPR_RSN_CNTNT RPT_RPR_RSN_CNTNT FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B ,NIC71B C ,NIC67B D ,NIC01B E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{par_SSPS_DL_CRT_SDT} AND #{par_SSPS_DL_CRT_EDT} AND B.MN_DL_BRN_CD LIKE #{par_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.DL_P_AML_CUST_ID = E.AML_CUST_ID AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99'

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT',TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD'),'') HNDL_DT -- 처리일자 ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'') RPT_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 혐의일자 ,B.MN_DL_BRN_NM RPT_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM -- 영업점명 --Fn_Cdinfo_Var('AC',C.GNL_AC_NO||C.GDS_NO,'') RPT_GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 ,C.GNL_AC_NO AS RPT_GNL_AC_NO --FN_RPT_CNV('GNL_AC_NO',C.GNL_AC_NO||C.GDS_NO,'') PRT_CS_NM -- 계좌명 ,NVL(E.CS_NM, E.ENG_CS_NM) AS PRT_CS_NM -- 계좌명 ,A.SSPS_TYP_CD SSPS_TYP_CD -- 시나리오 룰번호 ,CASE WHEN A.SSPS_TYP_CD = 'KYC0' THEN '임의 보고' ELSE GET_SYNARIO_NAME(A.SSPS_TYP_CD) END AS SSPS_TYP_NM -- 시나리오 룰 ,D.RPR_RSN_CNTNT RPT_RPR_RSN_CNTNT -- 보고사유 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B ,NIC71B C ,NIC67B D ,NIC01B E WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{par_SSPS_DL_CTR_SDT} AND #{par_SSPS_DL_CTR_EDT} AND B.MN_DL_BRN_CD LIKE #{par_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD NOT IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '9' AND A.OK_CCD = '2'

SELECT Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT',TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM, 'YYYYMMDD'),'') HNDL_DT -- 처리일자 ,Fn_Cdinfo_Var('DT', A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,'') RPT_SSPS_DL_CRT_DT -- 일자 ,A.SSPS_DL_ID AS SSPS_DL_ID ,B.MN_DL_BRN_NM RPT_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_NM -- 영업점명 --Fn_Cdinfo_Var('AC',C.GNL_AC_NO||C.GDS_NO,'') RPT_GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 ,C.GNL_AC_NO AS RPT_GNL_AC_NO ,FN_RPT_CNV('GNL_AC_NO',C.GNL_AC_NO||C.GDS_NO,'') PRT_CS_NM -- 계좌명 ,(SELECT K.CD_NM FROM NIC92B K WHERE K.CD = 'M045' AND K.CNTNT = C.DL_TYP_CD) RPT_DL_KND_NM -- 거래유형 --C.DL_AMT RPT_DL_AMT -- 거래금액 ,TO_CHAR(C.DL_AMT,'FM999,999,999,999,999,999') AS RPT_DL_AMT ,D.RPR_RSN_CNTNT RPT_RPR_RSN_CNTNT -- 보고사유 FROM NIC66B A ,NIC73B B ,NIC75B C ,NIC67B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{par_SSPS_DL_CTR_SDT} AND #{par_SSPS_DL_CTR_EDT} AND B.MN_DL_BRN_CD LIKE #{par_SSPS_DL_ANLYS_BRN_CD} AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR', 'CAC') AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT(+) AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = D.SSPS_DL_ID(+) AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT G.RULE_ID ,G.RULE_NAME ,G.RULE_DESC ,G.STR_ALERT_CNT /*STR발생건수*/ ,ROUND(G.STR_ALERT_CNT / NVL(G.TOT_CNT, 1) * 100, 1) AS STR_RATE /*발생비중*/ ,G.STR_91_CNT + G.STR_2_CNT AS STR_9_CNT /*처리건수*/ ,G.STR_91_CNT /*승인건수*/ ,G.STR_2_CNT /*보고제외(이상없음)건수*/ ,G.STR_KOFIU_CNT /*STR KOFIU 보고건수*/ ,ROUND(G.STR_KOFIU_CNT / DECODE(G.STR_ALERT_CNT, 0, 1, G.STR_ALERT_CNT) * 100, 1) AS STR_KOFIU_RATE /*KOFIU 보고비율*/ ,ROUND(G.STR_KOFIU_CNT / DECODE(G.KOFIU_TOT_CNT, 0, 1, NVL(G.KOFIU_TOT_CNT, 1) ) * 100, 1) AS STR_KOFIU_RATE2 /*KOFIU 발생비율*/ FROM ( SELECT M.RULE_ID ,MIN(M.RULE_NAME) AS RULE_NAME ,MIN(M.RULE_DESC) AS RULE_DESC ,SUM(DECODE(M.RULE_ID, N.SSPS_TYP_CD, 1, 0)) AS STR_ALERT_CNT /*STR발생건수*/ ,0 AS STR_9_CNT /*처리건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(M.RULE_ID, N.SSPS_TYP_CD, DECODE(N.OK_CCD, '1', CASE WHEN N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0), 0) ) AS STR_91_CNT /*승인건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(M.RULE_ID, N.SSPS_TYP_CD, DECODE(N.OK_CCD, '2', DECODE(N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '9', 1, 0), 0), 0) ) AS STR_2_CNT /*보고제외(이상없음)건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(M.RULE_ID, N.SSPS_TYP_CD, DECODE(N.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1, 0), 0) ) AS STR_KOFIU_CNT /*STR KOFIU 보고건수*/ ,MAX(N.TOT_CNT) AS TOT_CNT ,MAX(N.KOFIU_TOT_CNT) AS KOFIU_TOT_CNT ,MIN(M.ASIS_RULE_F) AS ASIS_RULE_F ,MIN(M.SORT_NO) AS SORT_NO FROM (
SELECT B.MA01_6 AS RULE_ID ,A.BIZ_NM AS RULE_NAME ,A.BIZ_DESC AS RULE_DESC ,'0' ASIS_RULE_F ,B.MA01_6 AS SORT_NO FROM C_BIZ A ,MMA010TB B WHERE A.BIZ_ID = B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_8 = 'S'
SELECT E.SCNR_ID AS RULE_ID ,E.SCNR_NM AS RULE_NAME ,E.SCNR_DESC AS RULE_DESC ,'0' ASIS_RULE_F ,E.SCNR_ID AS SORT_NO FROM TMS_APPL E
UNION ALL SELECT 'KYC0' ,'임의보고' ,'STR임의보고' ,'0' ASIS_RULE_F ,'R999' AS SORT_NO FROM DUAL ) M ,( SELECT K.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD ,K.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ,K.SSPS_TYP_CD ,K.OK_CCD ,COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOT_CNT ,SUM(DECODE(K.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1, 0) ) OVER() AS KOFIU_TOT_CNT FROM NIC66B K WHERE 1=1
AND K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{STR_DT} AND #{END_DT}
AND #{DPRT_CD} IN (SELECT I.HANDLNG_BRN_CD FROM NIC75B I WHERE I.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = K.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND K.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR')
AND K.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') /* STR */ /*AND NVL(K.INST_ID, 0) >= 0 */ AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL ) N WHERE M.RULE_ID = N.SSPS_TYP_CD(+) GROUP BY M.RULE_ID ORDER BY M.RULE_ID ) G WHERE 1=1
AND G.STR_ALERT_CNT >= CASE WHEN
(SELECT F.MA04_3 FROM MMA040TB F WHERE F.MA04_1 = 94)
(SELECT F.STD_VAL FROM NIC92B_STD_VAL F WHERE F.STD_ID = 94)
> #{END_DT} THEN CASE WHEN G.ASIS_RULE_F = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHEN G.ASIS_RULE_F = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
ORDER BY G.ASIS_RULE_F DESC ,G.SORT_NO ) UNION ALL SELECT '합계' ,'' ,'' ,COUNT(T.SSPS_TYP_CD) AS STR_ALERT_CNT /*STR발생건수*/ ,100 AS STR_RATE /*발생비중*/ ,SUM(DECODE(T.OK_CCD, '1', CASE WHEN T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0) ) + SUM(DECODE(T.OK_CCD, '2', DECODE(T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '9', 1, 0), 0) ) AS STR_9_CNT /*처리건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(T.OK_CCD, '1', CASE WHEN T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9', '99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0) ) AS STR_91_CNT /*승인건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(T.OK_CCD, '2', DECODE(T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '9', 1, 0), 0) ) AS STR_2_CNT /*보고제외(이상없음)건수*/ ,SUM(DECODE(T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1, 0) ) AS STR_KOFIU_CNT /*STR KOFIU 보고건수*/ ,ROUND(SUM(DECODE(T.RPR_PRGRS_CCD, '99', 1, 0) ) / COUNT(T.SSPS_TYP_CD) * 100, 1) AS STR_KOFIU_RATE /*KOFIU 보고비율*/ ,100 AS STR_KOFIU_RATE2 /*KOFIU 발생비율*/ FROM NIC66B T WHERE 1=1
AND T.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{STR_DT} AND #{END_DT}
AND #{DPRT_CD} IN (SELECT S.HANDLNG_BRN_CD FROM NIC75B S WHERE S.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = T.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND T.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR')
AND T.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR', 'KYC') /* STR */ /* AND NVL(T.INST_ID, 0) >= 0 */ AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT A.RPR_YR ,A.QUARTER ,NVL(B.CTR_CNT,0) AS CTR_CNT ,NVL(B.STR_CNT,0) AS STR_CNT ,NVL(B.TOT_CNT,0) AS TOT_CNT FROM ( SELECT (#{STARTDATE} + LEVEL - 1) AS RPR_YR ,1 AS QUARTER ,0 AS CTR_CNT ,0 AS STR_CNT ,0 AS TOT_CNT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (#{ENDDATE} - #{STARTDATE})+1 UNION ALL SELECT (#{STARTDATE} + LEVEL - 1) AS RPR_YR ,2 AS QUARTER ,0 AS CTR_CNT ,0 AS STR_CNT ,0 AS TOT_CNT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (#{ENDDATE} - #{STARTDATE})+1 UNION ALL SELECT (#{STARTDATE} + LEVEL - 1) AS RPR_YR ,3 AS QUARTER ,0 AS CTR_CNT ,0 AS STR_CNT ,0 AS TOT_CNT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (#{ENDDATE} - #{STARTDATE})+1 UNION ALL SELECT (#{STARTDATE} + LEVEL - 1) AS RPR_YR ,4 AS QUARTER ,0 AS CTR_CNT ,0 AS STR_CNT ,0 AS TOT_CNT FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (#{ENDDATE} - #{STARTDATE})+1 ) A ,( SELECT X.RPR_YR ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.RPR_DT),'Q') AS QUARTER ,SUM(DECODE(X.CTR_STR_CCD,'C', 1, 0)) AS CTR_CNT ,SUM(DECODE(X.CTR_STR_CCD,'S', 1, 0)) AS STR_CNT ,COUNT(*) AS TOT_CNT FROM NIC80B X ,NIC66B Y WHERE X.RPR_YR BETWEEN #{STARTDATE} AND #{ENDDATE} AND X.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = Y.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND X.SSPS_DL_ID = Y.SSPS_DL_ID AND Y.RPR_PRGRS_CCD ='99' AND Y.OK_CCD = '1' GROUP BY X.RPR_YR , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(X.RPR_DT),'Q') ) B WHERE A.RPR_YR=B.RPR_YR(+) AND A.QUARTER=B.QUARTER(+) ORDER BY A.RPR_YR, A.QUARTER

SELECT MIN(RELATIONROLECODE) AS RELATIONROLECODE, RNMCNO FROM ( SELECT '01' AS RELATIONROLECODE, C.RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC70B A , NIC66B B , NIC71B C WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.DL_P_RNMCNO = B.DL_P_RNMCNO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID UNION SELECT '03' AS RELATIONROLECODE, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC98B A , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT '09' RELATIONROLECODE, B.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC71B A , NIC72B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND B.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(B.PRXY_CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.PRXY_RNM_NO_CCD) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT '11' AS RELATIONROLECODE, -- 거래역할코드 D.RNMCNO FROM NIC17B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D , NIC02B E WHERE A.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND D.RNMCNO = E.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(D.CS_NO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} UNION SELECT '12' AS RELATIONROLECODE, A.PRXY_RNMCNO AS RNMCNO FROM NIC17B E , NIC18B A , NIC83B B , NIC75B C , NIC01B D WHERE E.ACNT_NO = B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AND E.GNL_AC_NO = A.GNL_AC_NO AND B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND B.SSPS_DL_ID = C.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.DL_DT = C.DL_DT AND B.DL_SQ = C.DL_SQ AND A.PRXY_RNMCNO = D.RNMCNO AND TRIM(A.PRXY_RNMCNO) IS NOT NULL AND C.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{SSPS_DL_CRT_DT} AND C.SSPS_DL_ID = #{SSPS_DL_ID} )GROUP BY RNMCNO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RULE_ID , RULE_NAME , RULE_DESC , TR_ALERT_CNT /*CTR발생건수*/ , 100 AS TR_RATE /*발생비중*/ , TR_91_CNT + TR_2_CNT AS TR_9_CNT /*처리건수*/ , TR_0_CNT , TR_91_CNT /*승인건수*/ , TR_2_CNT /*보고제외(이상없음)건수*/ , TR_KOFIU_CNT /*CTR KOFIU 보고건수*/ , ROUND(TR_KOFIU_CNT / DECODE(TR_ALERT_CNT,0,1,TR_ALERT_CNT) * 100,1) AS TR_KOFIU_RATE /*KOFIU 보고비율*/ , 100 AS TR_KOFIU_RATE2 /*KOFIU 발생비율*/ FROM (
SELECT 'CTR' as RULE_ID , '동일인 당일 현금 영수/지급' AS RULE_NAME , '20,000,000(이천만원)' AS RULE_DESC , SUM(1) AS TR_ALERT_CNT /*CTR발생건수*/ , 0 AS TR_9_CNT /*처리건수*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN T2.RPR_PRGRS_CCD NOT IN ('9','99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TR_0_CNT /*미처리*/ , SUM(DECODE(T2.OK_CCD,'1',CASE WHEN T2.RPR_PRGRS_CCD IN ('9','99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,0)) AS TR_91_CNT /*승인건수*/ , SUM(DECODE(T2.OK_CCD,'2',DECODE(T2.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'9',1,0),'0')) AS TR_2_CNT /*보고제외(이상없음)건수*/ , SUM(DECODE(T2.RPR_PRGRS_CCD,'99',1,0)) AS TR_KOFIU_CNT /*CTR KOFIU 보고건수*/ FROM ( SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD , OK_CCD -- 0:미확인 1:보고 2:보고제외 FROM NIC66B AA WHERE NVL(INST_ID,0) >= 0
AND AA.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT BETWEEN #{stDate} AND #{edDate}
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT MN_DL_BRN_CD FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = AA.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND SSPS_DL_ID = AA.SSPS_DL_ID AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'STR')
AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('CTR','CAC') /* CTR */ GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD , RPR_PRGRS_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD , OK_CCD ) T2 ) )
